# CADAgent

> Free, open-source Fusion 360 add-in that converts natural language into parametric CAD geometry.

## Facts

- Type: Fusion 360 add-in (Windows, macOS)
- License: Open source, free
- AI backend: Anthropic Claude API (BYOK)
- Capabilities: Sketches, extrusions, fillets, chamfers, threads, patterns, boolean operations
- Version: 1.0
- Author: Erik Forsten

## Links

- Website: https://cadagent.co
- GitHub: https://github.com/er-fo/CADAgent
- Install: https://cadagent.co/install/
- Download (Windows): https://github.com/er-fo/CADAgent/releases/download/v1.0-win/CADAgent-Windows.zip
- Download (macOS): https://github.com/er-fo/CADAgent/releases/download/v1.0-mac/CADAgent-macOS.zip
